report_name: India's CERT-In Mandates 12-Hour Patching for Critical Flaws in Response to AI-Driven Attacks

tools.name: Artificial Intelligence
tools.description: A technology category noted as being increasingly used by threat actors to accelerate attack timelines, including automating vulnerability scanning, exploit development, and creating convincing phishing campaigns, which prompted the new CERT-In mandate.

identities.name: Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-In)
identities.description: India's national agency for responding to computer security incidents, which published a new cybersecurity blueprint mandating accelerated patching timelines for critical and high-severity vulnerabilities in response to AI-driven threats.
